summary: Completed frontend testing of Gantt chart drag-and-drop task rescheduling feature. All 7 requested features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Gantt chart drag-and-drop - task bars are draggable with cursor-grab cursor
Drag indicator - shows 'Moving to [date] (+X days)' during drag (tested both forward and backward)
Confirm Reschedule Dialog - shows task name, original dates, new dates, and days delta badge
Days delta badge - correctly shows '+X days Pushed forward' for forward drag
Days delta badge - correctly shows '-X days Moved earlier' for backward drag
Task update - confirming reschedule updates task dates via PUT /api/tasks/{id}
Database persistence - verified task dates updated in database after reschedule
Toast notification - shows success message 'Task rescheduled X days forward/back'
Cancel button - closes dialog and discards changes
Task position update - task bar visually moves to new position after confirmation
Tasks page loads with List and Gantt view toggle
Gantt view displays tasks grouped by job with proper date timeline
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gantt chart drag-and-drop rescheduling feature fully tested and working. Task 'Install Partition Walls Level 2' (job 2024-002) currently has dates Mar 25 - Mar 29. Only tasks with planned_start dates can be dragged. The confirm dialog shows impact analysis if there are downstream tasks.

features_verified.Drag-and-drop task bars: PASS - cursor-grab class on task bars enables dragging
features_verified.Drag indicator: PASS - shows 'Moving to [date] (+/-X days)' at top during drag
features_verified.Confirm Reschedule Dialog: PASS - shows original dates, new dates, days delta badge
features_verified.Task update API: PASS - PUT /api/tasks/{id} called with new dates
features_verified.Task position update: PASS - task bar moves to new position visually
